> meter stormforce shown at the link below is
> inflatable and not foam.   please 
> note that the bow is intentionally made rigid and
> not inflatable for two  
> purposes, supposedly cuts through waves better and
> reduces tube separation  problems 
> from rough conditions.

body_html:
nice photo
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

I am awaiting confirmation from Red Bay Boats that
the tubing on their 11
meter stormforce shown at the link below is
inflatable and not foam. please
note that the bow is intentionally made rigid and
not inflatable for two
purposes, supposedly cuts through waves better and
reduces tube separation problems
from rough conditions.

http://redbayboats.com/images/sf11/llomond/DSC_0368.jpg

(http://redbayboats.com/images/sf11/llomond/DSC_0368.jpg)
